hero.title: Every PDF & Image Tool You'll Ever Need

calc.n2w_desc: Convert numbers to text or currency

band.organize_sub: Merge, split, rotate, crop and reorder your PDF pages instantly.

band.convert_sub: Convert between PDF, Word, Excel, PowerPoint, JPG and HTML.
band.advanced_sub: Powerful conversion, OCR & AI tools for demanding tasks.
band.instant_sub: Fast, free and browser-powered — no signup needed.

section.tools_desc: The most-used PDF tools — fast, free, and browser-powered. No signup required.
section.categories_title: Everything You Need to Manage PDFs
section.categories_desc: 33+ free tools organised by task — from quick fixes to advanced AI processing.

trust.title: Why Users Trust ILovePDF.cyou
trust.desc: Built around your privacy. No account needed. Files deleted instantly.
trust.privacy_desc: Files are processed in your browser or deleted from our servers within seconds.
trust.fast_desc: Most tools run entirely in your browser for instant, lag-free results.
trust.secure_desc: All uploads are encrypted in transit. No data is ever sold or shared.
trust.free_desc: Every tool is free. No paywalls, no forced sign-ups, no watermarks.

footer.desc: Free PDF & Image tools online. No sign-up required.
footer.deleted: Files are deleted automatically within seconds.
